{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322061917886489903F5EE735B239"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618384003314451224","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"开头真的很不错啊，一开始就不熟悉路飞的橡胶身体！文笔也可以！加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773797834,"group_id":"7616728197891116056","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+lR329YvxEKLi3XB6r3Ku1fONKL2h+DTM350FE+v69G","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702450&x-signature=Ei72J6rSbnhecWr1N7y3lf3qNeE%3D","user_id":"3659641509393272","user_name":"青川的本城正幸"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3659641509393272","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7616728197891116056","book_info":{"abstract":"现代海迷一觉醒来，魂穿蒙奇·D·路飞。
顶着海贼王主角的身份，握着全剧情的记忆，本该一路爽到底，他却当场崩溃：坏了，我成路飞了！
橡胶果实在手，草帽在肩，熟知所有伏笔与悲剧。他不再是那个天然呆的少年，而是清醒吐槽、步步算计的穿越者。
阻止遗憾，改写命运，护好每一位伙伴，手撕所有反派。
从东海出海，到登顶世界之巅，一路开挂、一路爆笑、一路燃炸。
这一次，没有遗憾，没有别离，他要带着草帽团，以最爽的姿势，登顶海贼王！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/e5864cecace661bdeaffdefb328e3be2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"五杯枸杞压压惊","author_id":"","book_id":"7616728197891116056","book_name":"海贼：坏了，我成路飞了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#304870","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1279人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7616728238978515480","read_count":"1279","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"115364"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"41","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,轻小说,魂穿,海贼,穿越,反派","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e5864cecace661bdeaffdefb328e3be2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779315557&x-signature=9g5RL0btMc48Xx1uE%2Fp2HhrkIHQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4178567695963076","extra":{"comment_jump_schema"
